title: Economic Development Administration Awarding $4.5 million Grant to Sitnasuak Native Corporation to Support Energy Infrastructure Improvements
summary: At the end of September, U.S. Secretary of Commerce Gina Raimondo announced that the Department’s Economic Development Administration (EDA) awarded a $4.5 million grant to Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) to support energy infrastructure.
